summary: Iteration 42 - IPL Data Accuracy Testing Complete. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: All 10 IPL teams displayed correctly, 70 total matches (67 upcoming, 0 live, 3 completed), completed matches show non-zero scores with both r/w/o AND runs/wickets/overs fields, match_winner populated for all completed matches, MI vs CSK status correctly shows 'upcoming' (not 'live'), no duplicate matches, no non-IPL teams.
critical_code_review_comments: _normalize_score() correctly guarantees both r/w/o AND runs/wickets/overs in every score object
MI vs CSK status fix working - shows 'upcoming' not 'live' (false live detection fixed)
match_winner populated for all 3 completed matches: RCB, MI, RR
Total 70 matches exactly (orphan RCB vs KKR deleted)
Score protection working - completed matches retain non-zero scores
Winner text displayed on completed match cards: 'Royal Challengers Bengaluru won by 6 wkts', 'Mumbai Indians won by 6 wkts', 'Rajasthan Royals won by 8 wkts'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 42 verified all IPL data accuracy fixes. Key verified features: 1) Total 70 matches (67 upcoming, 0 live, 3 completed). 2) All 10 IPL teams only (MI, CSK, RCB, KKR, DC, PBKS, RR, SRH, GT, LSG). 3) Score normalization working - both r/w/o AND runs/wickets/overs present. 4) MI vs CSK status is 'upcoming' (false live detection fixed). 5) match_winner populated for all completed matches. 6) No duplicate matches. 7) Frontend displays scores correctly with winner text.
